title: Alex's Magical Biomes
description: New magical biomes and 2 new wood types!
body:
# Vanilla friendly magical Biomes
Enhancing existing biomes with two new wood types: **Frost Wood** and **Willow Wood**. In the Snowy Taiga, you’ll now find Frost Trees, their icy bark yielding Frost Wood—perfect for crafting cool, pale builds with a wintry vibe. 

In Swamp Biomes, discover graceful Willow Trees, a wood ideal for rustic or mystical designs.
#
Both wood types come with their own planks, stairs, slabs, seamlessly integrating into the vanilla game. The classic biomes themselves remain unchanged, but these new trees add a subtle, magical charm to your world.
#
### A few example pictures:
![Magical Forest](https://i.imgur.com/nfNRbAg.png)
![Huge Birch Trees](https://i.imgur.com/K93Midc.png)
![Willow Wood - a new Wood Type](https://i.imgur.com/p0jqELq.png)
![Frost Forest - With a new Wood Type](https://i.imgur.com/nkSmaeb.png)
